title: Rename full template structure on automation

posts.author: JB88 (Justin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I want to create an automation on a work template. When a new project is added to a board => create new board with the name of the item.

So far so good, when I have 1 board the name of the folder is changed but only the map structure.

F.E. create PROJECT JB

create map PROJECT JB

        containing Board Project JB
        meeting notes Project JB
